KEY DEFINITION 
ARGO profiles  Measurement profile performed by an autonomous float deployed by the Argo 
program.  
Easy CORA Easy Cora dataset in a user -friendly version of the CORA dataset that includes 
only the best estimation of the measured parameters, a distribution of only good 
and probably good data and a time and vertical sub sampling of the profiles.
